results.name: El Salvador
results.key_finding: PENDING PROPOSAL STANDS - NO DUPLICATE. Today's evidence (Cristosal exile, indefinite re-election amendment, 140+ defenders fled) is the SAME basis already captured in the 2026-07-02 pending downgrade to 15.0 (Developing->Critical, delta -5.3, status pending/unapplied). The 140+ figure is incremental detail on the same arc; no materially new event changes the proposed number. No second proposal emitted. Baseline used = published 20.3.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Attribution screen. The Jul 1 killing of 3 Palestinians, 3,465 ceasefire violations, 1,053 killed since truce, and 36%-of-trucks aid blockage are ISRAEL's conduct (scored against Israel), not Palestinian-state own conduct. No new own-conduct harm or positive countervailing conduct within window. Confirm 25.0. (rotation-state drift 20/rank127/critical corrected to published 25/rank123/developing.)

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Double-count + non-state. Record lean-season hunger (35M+, FAO up to 52.8M regional) continues the already-priced June crossing; insurgent (JNIM/ISWAP) attacks are non-state; the WFP funding gap is not state obstruction. Formal IPC Phase 5 remains a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Double-count + forward-trigger. Ethnic Unity Law (in force, Day 5) codifies already-priced assimilation policy plus an Article 63 transnational claim; no documented extraterritorial enforcement yet; Germany's concern is third-party. Marginal dock ~-1.5 sub-threshold. Confirm 19.5.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Attribution + non-state. IDF strikes on ~10 southern sites are Israel's conduct; Hezbollah is non-state; an unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence. No new Lebanese-state own conduct. Confirm 17.2.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Exogenous-disaster screen. Day-11 quake (~2,954 dead, 50k+ unaccounted) is a natural event; only the response is scorable. Rising toll is scale/disclosure; chronic data opacity already priced; any single-source falsification claim is a forward trigger; aid acceptance blocks a downgrade. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Attribution (other state). The Jul 1-3 Kyiv strikes (30+ killed) and wider July toll are RUSSIA's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Harm by another state cannot downgrade the victim state; Ukraine's civilian-protection response is band-consistent. Confirm 50.0.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Non-state + double-count + calibration flag. JNIM Bamako siege is non-state; ~5M-in-need/~18.5%-funded continue the priced crisis; HRW Jun 28 grave-abuses report reflects the priced arc. OPEN Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3) carried to coordinator, not an assessor one-off. Confirm 12.5.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor screen. 7.8M food-insecure, 73,300 at IPC Phase 5, famine risk in 4 counties reinforce but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. No positive countervailing state conduct. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: Near-floor screen. SCOTUS TPS termination for ~350k Haitians is US conduct; gang control of ~90% of Port-au-Prince (8,200+ killed) is non-state; 5.8M food-insecure / 1.5M displaced continue the priced collapse. No fresh Haitian-state own-conduct event. Confirm 4.7. (rotation-state drift 0/rank193 corrected to published 4.7/rank177.)

results.name: Democratic Republic of C
results.key_finding: Near-floor + exogenous disease. WHO Ebola case count (~1,406/438) with international spread (Uganda/France/Germany) is an exogenous outbreak scored on response; M23 harm attributes to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower 2.3. Confirm 2.3.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor own-conduct (bounded). Khamenei funeral (Day 2) and paused US-Iran talks are procedural; the Fallahi death sentence (Jul 1) is Iran's own conduct but continues the already-priced execution pattern (784+ YTD). A single sentence does not clear a fresh threshold toward the floor. Confirm 2.5.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor + realized harm attributed HERE. The Jul 1-3 Kyiv strikes (30+ killed) and wider July toll are scored against Russia; the EU crime-of-aggression Special Tribunal is operational; 20,500+ children deported. Already at 0.0; reinforcing evidence cannot lower the floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor + non-state. UN red alert (Jul 3), RSF El Obeid siege, and El Fasher crimes-against-humanity are RSF (non-state) conduct. Reinforces but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication. The DOJ criminal probe now extends to Optum Rx / physician reimbursement, and a civil MA-inflation probe continues; neither is decided in court. The Grassley 'gaming' finding is already priced; the June sector takedown is context. Confirm 10.2; forward trigger = indictment/ruling/settlement (Q2 earnings Jul 29).

NO duplicate/second proposal emitted. Baseline used = published 20.3. Pending proposal file unchanged (status pending, unapplied). rotation-state left at published 20.3, last_change_proposal 2026-07-02.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN - coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Mali confirmed at published baseline; no assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)). Burkina Faso not in today's assessment set.

math_hygiene.note: No score changes today; all 15 are confirmations at live-index baselines from countries.json/fortune-500.json. El Salvador's operative change is the unchanged 2026-07-02 pending proposal (reconstructs to 15.0). No math-hygiene discrepancies (no recomputation on changed dimensions).

rotation_state_integrity: For all 15 entities, rotation-state composite/band/rank mirror PUBLISHED index values; only last_assessed/last_scanned/last_evidence_touch timestamps updated. Two pre-existing drifts corrected TO PUBLISHED (not proposed): palestine 20/rank127/critical -> 25/rank123/developing; haiti 0/rank193/critical -> 4.7/rank177/critical. El Salvador left at published 20.3 with last_change_proposal 2026-07-02 (pending, unapplied). No proposed/unapplied values written to rotation-state.
forward_triggers_logged: El Salvador: enforcement of indefinite re-election in 2027, new mass-detention escalation, or further HRD imprisonment = deeper downgrade beyond pending; due-process restoration / detainee release with repair = upgrade support.

Palestine: independently documented Palestinian-authority deliberate targeting of, or systematic aid diversion from, its own civilians = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection/relief scale-up under Palestinian control = upgrade.
Nigeria: formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno or documented state aid obstruction = downgrade.
China: first documented Article 63 extraterritorial enforcement action = downgrade.
Lebanon: implemented civilian-protecting ceasefire with the state extending governance/relief to the south = upgrade.
Venezuela: independently verified falsification/suppression of death data or deliberate relief obstruction = downgrade; transparent equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
Ukraine: documented Ukrainian-state failure to protect / discriminatory relief = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection scale-up = upgrade.
Mali/Burkina Faso: state-perpetrated civilian violence or siege expansion = downgrade; aid-access + NGO-space restoration = upgrade.
South Sudan: verified state-led equitable relief scale-up and civilian protection = upgrade.
Haiti: documented Haitian-state security-force atrocities or deliberate relief obstruction = downgrade; verified state-led civilian protection/relief restoration = upgrade.
DRC: collapse/obstruction of Ebola response = downgrade; verified containment scale-up = upgrade.
Iran: documented succession-linked mass repression / lethal crackdown = downgrade; due-process restoration / prisoner release = upgrade.
Russia: cessation of attacks on civilians, return of deported children, cooperation with accountability = upgrade.
Sudan: verified state-led civilian protection and equitable relief access = upgrade.
UnitedHealth: DOJ complaint/indictment/ruling/settlement/admitted findings = downgrade (watch Q2 earnings Jul 29).
